bucketCreate.title: Create your first bucket
bucketCreate.body: Buckets organize your files. Click Create bucket and choose public (served over the CDN) or private access — you can add files right after.

upload.title: Upload your files
upload.body: Open a bucket to upload files — drag and drop, or use the upload button. Uploads run in parallel and each file gets a shareable CDN URL.

buckets.title: Buckets
buckets.description: Organize your files across isolated storage buckets.

empty.title: No buckets yet
empty.description: Create your first bucket to start storing files.

create.title: Create bucket
create.slugHelp: Used in URLs. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
create.publicHelp: Anyone with a file URL can view public bucket contents without authentication.

detail.videoOptimizeHint: Compresses video uploads and generates 144/480/720/1080p variants. Slower upload — pick a smaller bitrate at playback time.
detail.renameFolderDesc: Rename "{path}" — descendant folders and files inside move with it.
detail.renameFolderConflict: A folder with that name already exists
detail.deleteFolderConfirmDesc: This permanently deletes the folder, all subfolders and every file inside. This cannot be undone.
detail.deleteFolderPartial: {ok} files deleted, {failed} failed — folder partially cleared
detail.visibilityCdnWarning: Bucket visibility updated, but the storage provider rejected the file ACL sync. Proxy access will continue to work.
detail.emptyFiles: No files in this bucket yet.
detail.deleteConfirmDesc: {name} will be permanently removed from this bucket. This cannot be undone.
detail.bulkDeleteConfirmDesc: Selected files will be permanently removed from this bucket. This cannot be undone.
detail.uploadTooLargeMulti: {count} files were skipped — each must be under {max}.

embed.hint: Drop the iframe on any page to embed the player. Works on public files only.

embedBuilder.title: Build embed code
embedBuilder.description: Pick how the player should behave when it loads, then copy the iframe.
embedBuilder.autoplayHint: Browsers force autoplay to start muted.
embedBuilder.hideControlsHint: Strips the transport bar so only the video frame shows.

usage.title: Overview
usage.description: Storage activity, quota, and breakdowns across your buckets.
usage.uploadsTrendDesc: Daily uploads in the last 30 days.
usage.recentUploadsDesc: The most recent files uploaded across your buckets.

landing.heroTitle: A <accent>professional</accent> storage layer for your media
landing.heroSubtitle: Bucket organization, on-the-fly image transforms, multipart uploads and signed URLs — one API, your infra.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Brand assets, user uploads and internal media — all behind one origin.
landing.feature_buckets_desc: Per-company isolated buckets, public/private visibility, slug-based routing.
landing.feature_transforms_desc: Resize, format conversion (WebP/AVIF), quality, smart-crop — driven by URL params.
landing.feature_multipart_desc: 3-parallel pool for large files, automatic resume; survives a tab close.
landing.feature_cdn_desc: Immutable cache headers, geo distribution, hash-resistant URLs — cold cache is rare in practice.
landing.feature_signed_desc: Time-bound, scoped access — leak-resistant tokens for private buckets.
landing.feature_sdk_desc: TypeScript, Python, Go and PHP — every endpoint typed, with examples.
landing.how_step1_desc: From the dashboard or SDK — pick visibility and access policy.
landing.how_step2_desc: Drag-and-drop, multipart upload, or SDK. Crop and tweak inline.
landing.how_step3_desc: Direct CDN URL, transform via query params, immutable cache headers.
landing.sdkSubtitle: Multipart upload, transforms, bucket management — single import.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Looking for a self-hosted alternative? Start small, grow as you ship.
landing.pricing_bullet3: CDN and signed URLs on every plan
landing.footerTagline: Sentroy Storage — buckets, image transforms and CDN delivery; on your infra, one API.
landing.cookieDescription: We use necessary cookies to make our site work. With your consent, we also set analytics and marketing cookies to help us improve the product.
landing.cookiePreferencesDescription: Choose which cookie categories are active. Necessary cookies are always on because the site cannot function without them.
landing.cookieNecessaryDesc: Required for authentication, security, and basic site features. Always on.
landing.cookieAnalyticsDesc: Aggregated usage data that helps us understand which features matter most.
landing.cookieMarketingDesc: Personalized content and measurement for campaigns we run outside the site.
